PreToolUse.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$input = $Input | ConvertFrom-Json; $tool = $input.toolName; $dangerous = @('Remove-Item','Clear-Content','Stop-Process','Remove-AzResourceGroup','Remove-AzPolicyAssignment'); if ($dangerous -contains $tool) { @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PreToolUse';permissionDecision='ask';permissionDecisionReason="Destructive operation: $tool — confirm before proceeding"}} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3 }"

SessionStart.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "@{systemMessage='You are working in a Pester Test Development workspace (Play 101). Remember: use @builder for test generation, @reviewer for quality checks, @tuner for coverage optimization. Process files one at a time for large codebases.'} | ConvertTo-Json"
